title: tissa diandra
intro: Tissa diandra, also known as the Yellow Bells or Golden Trumpet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparation of Tissa diandra typically involves drying and boiling the roots and leaves to create a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
